birthDate.label: Date of Birth
birthDate.required: Please enter your date of birth.

fieldsOfInterests.label: Industry / Field of Interest
fieldsOfInterests.required: Please select at least one industry.
fieldsOfInterests.maxSelected: You can select up to 5 industries.

content.title: Share anything that might help us better understand your situation and goals.
content.description: This helps us tailor your career roadmap and recommendations.

info.privacy: For your privacy, please avoid sharing sensitive information (e.g. ID numbers, passport details, or bank account information)
info.referenceOnly: This information is self-described by you and used only as a reference for AI guidance. It is not used for any legal, official, or immigration decisions

options.alreadyApplied: I have already submitted job applications
options.partTimeOrInternship: Currently working part-time or doing an internship

placeholderByTargetJob.sales: e.g. [Academic] In my 'Global Marketing' course, I analyzed consumer trends in my home country and presented an entry strategy for Korean appliances, earning an A+.[Professional] Later, as a trade intern, I managed email correspondence with buyers and assisted in preparing trade documents like Invoices.
placeholderByTargetJob.marketing: e.g. [Academic] Conducted a survey of 100 international students for a 'Consumer Psychology' course to analyze K-brand awareness.[Professional] As a marketing intern, I managed local social media channels and improved post reach by 30% through data-driven targeting and localized content.
placeholderByTargetJob.planningStrategy: e.g. [Academic] Developed a startup business model and designed risk management strategies using SWOT analysis in a 'Business Strategy' course.[Professional] During a field practicum, I organized inventory data to identify cost-saving opportunities and suggested streamlining report procedures.
placeholderByTargetJob.production: e.g. [Academic] In an 'Operations Management' course, I studied SCM principles and completed a simulation project on MRP using ERP systems.[Professional] During a manufacturing internship, I tracked inventory flow and analyzed supplier prices for cost reduction. I also updated quality checklists.

techStack.title: Tech Stack
techStack.description: I have experience with these languages / frameworks (e.g., Java, Python, JavaScript, Spring, React, Node.js).

csTools.title: CS & Tools
csTools.description: I understand basic CS topics (data structures, algorithms, databases) and use Git / GitHub regularly.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: I have 1+ completed projects (personal, school, or team) with code on GitHub or a portfolio site.

teamWorkExperience.title: Team / Work Experience
teamWorkExperience.description: I have worked on a team or real-world setting (internship, part-time, open-source, or collaboration with designers/PMs) as a developer.

dataTools.title: Data Tools
dataTools.description: I can work with data using Excel/Google Sheets (formulas, pivot tables) and at least one BI tool (e.g., Tableau, Power BI)

sqlProgramming.title: SQL & Programming
sqlProgramming.description: I can write basic SQL queries (SELECT, JOIN, GROUP BY) and have some experience with Python or R for data analysis.

analysisStorytelling.title: Analysis & Storytelling
analysisStorytelling.description: I have practiced turning data into insights (simple analysis, charts, or reports) and explaining results in plain language.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: I have 1+ data projects (school, Kaggle, personal) that I can show in a portfolio or GitHub.

channelsTools.title: Channels & Tools
channelsTools.description: I have experience using at least one digital channel (e.g., Instagram, YouTube, blog, email) and basic tools (Meta Ads, Google Analytics, etc.).

contentCopy.title: Content & Copy
contentCopy.description: I have created marketing content (social posts, blog, emails, landing pages) in English or Korean.

dataExperimentation.title: Data & Experimentation
dataExperimentation.description: I have looked at simple marketing metrics (clicks, conversions, followers) and tried A/B tests or small experiments.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: I have participated in at least one campaign or project (school club, side project, internship) with measurable outcomes.

clientCommunication.title: Client Communication
clientCommunication.description: I am comfortable talking or writing with customers/partners in English or Korean (email, calls, meetings).

salesToolsProcess.title: Sales Tools & Process
salesToolsProcess.description: I understand basic sales steps (prospecting → meeting → proposal → follow-up) and have used simple CRM/spreadsheet tracking.

numbersTargets.title: Numbers & Targets
numbersTargets.description: I am used to working with simple sales KPIs (leads, meetings, revenue) and tracking them over time.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: I have experience in a customer-facing role (part-time, internship, club, volunteering) where I had to persuade or negotiate.

date.invalidDate: Invalid date. Please enter a valid calendar date.
date.pastNotAllowed: Please enter a future date for your expected graduation.
date.mustBeAfterIssuance: The date must be after the visa issuance date.

visa.d2ExpirationInPast: Please select a valid D-2 visa expiration date that is not in the past.
visa.d2ExceedsTwoYears: D-2 visa must be valid for at least two year from the issuance date.
visa.d2ExpirationBeforeGraduation: The visa expiration date must be on or after your expected graduation date.
visa.d10InvalidDuration: Invalid expiration date. The D-10 visa must be set in 6-month intervals.
visa.d10ExpirationInPast: Please select a valid D-10 visa expiration date that is not in the past.
visa.d2IssuanceAfterGraduation: Please enter a graduation date that is later than your visa issuance date.
visa.startDateAfterExpiration: Please enter a Visa Start Date that is earlier than your Visa Expiration Date.
